title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 Operational Risk Management Module OM-5.5 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Requires conventional banks to implement board-approved cybersecurity risk frameworks, independent cyber functions, CISO roles, cyber strategy and policy, data classification, controls, training, recovery and CBB incident reporting.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk management rules for conventional bank licensees.
theme_notes.cybersecurity.incident_reporting: Cyber incident reporting rules for conventional bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines and CBB Cyber Security Requirements Letter 2025
